title: French Apple Crepes
description: A delicious breakfast dessert featuring French crepes filled with tender apples. Perfect for a cozy morning.

ingredients.name: Apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or any sweet variety

instructions: Warm the French crepes according to package instructions.
Peel, core, and slice the apples into thin pieces.
In a pan, melt 1 tbsp of butter over medium heat.
Add sliced apples, sugar, and cinnamon to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
To assemble, place a warm crepe flat on a plate.
Spread a portion of the cooked apple mixture onto the crepe, leaving a 1-inch border.
Fold the crepe in half over the filling, then fold in the sides to form a triangle.
Serve with additional butter, golden brown sugar, or whipped cream if desired.
